api.label: WikiSignals API Definitions
api.mission: We are building the reliability infrastructure for the internet.
api.content: Explanation of domain data, metrics, and terms.

ws_web_name.label: Site name
ws_web_name.description: The entity that controls the website of the domain.

ws_web_url.label: Effective URL
ws_web_url.description: The first URL that returns HTTP status code 200 (via cURL).

ws_web_lang.label: Language
ws_web_lang.description: The primary language of the website (as declared on the HTML 'lang' attribute).

ws_score.label: WikiSignals score (0.0-1.0)
ws_score.description: The WikiSignals estimate (0.0-1.0) of the website's credibility as an information source, based an external ratings, press-association memberships, inclusion in vetted news indices, and other factors.

ws_mbfc_score.label: MBFC score
ws_mbfc_score.description: A numeric estimate (0.0-1.0) of the website's credibility as an information source, calculated by assigning number values to the domain's Media Bias/Fact Check credibilty and fact-reporting ratings.

ws_rate_domainq.label: Domain Quality score
ws_rate_domainq.description: A numeric estimate (0.0-1.0) of the website's credibility as an information source, as calculated by Domain Quality.

ws_web_reg.label: Domain registration date
ws_web_reg.description: The date the domain name was registered (source: RDAP).

ws_web_rank.label: Global site rank
ws_web_rank.description: The Tranco estimate of the website's global traffic ranking (from 1 to 20,000,000)

ws_wbm_first.label: Wayback Machine: First capture
ws_wbm_first.description: The first snapshot of the website by the Internet Archive's Wayback Machine.

ws_wbm_last.label: Wayback Machine: Latest capture
ws_wbm_last.description: The most recent snapshot of the website by the Internet Archive's Wayback Machine.

ws_wbm_total.label: Wayback Machine: Total captures
ws_wbm_total.description: The total snapshots of the website by the Internet Archive's Wayback Machine.

ws_wikidata_qid.label: Wikidata QID
ws_wikidata_qid.description: The unique identifier at Wikidata for the website.

ws_wiki_cite_en.label: Wikipedia link count
ws_wiki_cite_en.description: The number of times the domain appeared in links within Wikipedia (English) articles (including the Citations, References, Notes and External Links sections).

ws_wiki_rsp_en_cats.label: Wikipedia Perennial Source
ws_wiki_rsp_en_cats.description: The category assigned the domain if it appears in the Wikipedia Reliable/Perennial Sources list (Deprecated, Generally Reliable, etc.).

ws_wiki_spam_hits.label: Wikimedia Spam Blocklist hits
ws_wiki_spam_hits.description: The Spam blocklists at Wikimedia that include the domain.

ws_mbfc_cats.label: Media Bias/Fact Check ratings
ws_mbfc_cats.description: The domain's ratings by Media Bias/Fact Check.

ws_mbfc_url.label: Media Bias/Fact Check URL
ws_mbfc_url.description: The domain's rating page at Media Bias/Fact Check.

press_assoc.about: Members of Press Associations, state and national (USA)

GFMD.name: Global Forum for Media Development
GFMD.description: Members of <a href="https://gfmd.info/">Global Forum for Media Development</a>

LION.name: Local Independent Online News Publishers
LION.description: Members of <a href="https://www.lionpublishers.com/">Local Independent Online News Publishers</a>

NY.name: New York News Publishers Association
NY.description: Members of <a href="https://www.nynpa.com/">New York News Publishers Association</a> (state)

LNI-Digital.name: Local News Initiative: Digital
LNI-Digital.description: Sites indexed by <a href="https://localnewsinitiative.northwestern.edu/">Local News Initiative: Digital</a>

unreliable.about: Sites included in a list of Unreliable Sources

Iffy.name: Iffy.news Index of Unreliable Sources
Iffy.description: Sites listed in the Iffy.news <a href="https://iffy.news/index/">Index of Unreliable Sources</a>

OpenSrc.name: Open Sources
OpenSrc.description: Sites listed in <a href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/10eA5-mCZLSS4MQY5QGb5ewC3VAL6pLkT53V_81ZyitM/preview?tab=t.0">Open Sources</a> (false, misleading, clickbait-y, and satirical “news”)

WikiFake-en.name: Wikipedia (en): List of fake news websites
WikiFake-en.description: Sites in Wikipedia (en): <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_fake_news_websites">List of fake news websites</a>

WikiSatire-en.name: Wikipedia (en): List of satirical news websites
WikiSatire-en.description: Sites in Wikipedia (en): <a>List of satirical news websites</a>
